title: From India to Iran: How Hitler redefined 'Aryan' for the Nazis
summary: According to Nazi ideology, an ideal "Aryan" was blond, blue-eyed with athletic features. The term is still tied to Nazi Germany, but its origin lies elsewhere.

title: Germany: BioNTech shutting down COVID vaccine production entirely, 1,860 jobs at risk
summary: The German company that pioneered one of the first mRNA coronavirus vaccines is halting production, handing the reins to partner Pfizer. BioNTech is restructuring to focus on research and illnesses like cancer.

title: Germany: Couple admits €1.9 million parking meter thefts
summary: A German couple accused of siphoning large quantities of cash from parking meters has confessed in court. Nearly two million euros disappeared from machines in a picturesque Bavarian town — but no one noticed for years.

title: Germany news: Merz plays down US military withdrawal plans
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz has said a US threat to pull troops out of Germany is "nothing new." Meanwhile, Germany’s interior minister says border controls will stay despite falling asylum numbers.

title: Merz 'not giving up' on Germany's relationship with US
summary: The German chancellor said there was "no connection" between disagreements over the Iran war and the pullout of US troops from Germany. He insisted he shared Trump's goal of ensuring Iran never obtains a nuclear weapon.

title: Germany: Who is CDU parliamentary leader Jens Spahn?
summary: CDU firebrand, ex-health minister, and leader of his party's parliamentary group, Jens Spahn has been dogged by controversy. But his ambition is undimmed.

title: Germany prepares for mission in the Strait of Hormuz
summary: The German minesweeper Fulda has set course for the Mediterranean. The German armed forces may assist in clearing mines in the Strait of Hormuz — although only under certain conditions.

title: Germany: Difficult first year for Chancellor Friedrich Merz
summary: A year after taking office, Germany's federal leadership is struggling with the drudgery of coalition governance. Whenever there are problems, the coalition partners are blamed. Or US President Donald Trump.

title: Women's Champions League: Bayern fall to Barcelona in semis
summary: Bayern Munich have come up short in their bid to win the Women's Champions League for the first time after losing to Barcelona in the semifinals.

title: 2026 Goethe Medal: Meet the recipients
summary: Though they work in different fields and countries, what unites them is their focus on a Europe in transition: Arvo Pärt, Anita Raja and Prodromos Tsinikoris have been awarded the 2026 Goethe Medal.
